subject: Sync rtl88x2bu with upstream
author: Grzegorz Krzystek

upstream.vanilla_quote: static const struct usb_device_id rtw_8822bu_id_table[] = { { USB_DEVICE_AND_INTERFACE_INFO(RTW_USB_VENDOR_ID_REALTEK, 0xb812, ...), ... }; MODULE_DEVICE_TABLE(usb, rtw_8822bu_id_table);

impact.effect_if_absent: RTL8822BU USB wireless adapters would require alternative driver implementation; main branch uses CONFIG_RTW88_8822BU from mainline kernel instead

license_provenance: GPL-2.0 / Dual BSD-3-Clause (as marked in rtl88x2bu_source)
notes: GROUPED COMMIT in patch-provenance.md (line 389) with 8 other Realtek driver syncs (33ff5146a, 3740d5b88, 2371fb1aa, 4e98a68d1, 43fbb63ae, 993b82e31, 115b1d1ae, fc09a292a). DISPOSITION: The commit is deliberately not carried in-kernel because RTL8822BU support is now provided by the mainline rtw88_8822bu driver (CONFIG_RTW88_8822BU=m in linux.config:481), which was backported/added to 6.18. BR2_PACKAGE_RTL88X2BU exists and is commit-pinned to morrownr's fork (fecac34), but is explicitly disabled in defconfig:580. VERIFICATION: Mainline 6.18.38 rtw88 driver at /mnt/source/linux/drivers/net/wireless/realtek/rtw88/ includes RTW88_8822BU support with equivalent/superior device ID coverage (30+ devices from rtw8822bu.c). The previously-noted Edimax EW-7822ULC device fix (115b1d1ae) is already present in mainline device table (0x7392:0xb822 with explicit comment). FAILURE_MODE: Silent — RTL8822BU hardware works via mainline driver instead; no user-visible breakage. SUPERSESSION_CHAIN: fork rtl88x2bu (this commit) → deprecated in favor of → mainline rtw88_8822bu (active, kernel config) ∪ BR2_PACKAGE_RTL88X2BU (inactive, available for fallback). FORWARD_PORT: Not applicable; mainline provides superior implementation. sonnet-verified: WPA3/defconfig:580 citation re-derived and CONFIRMED exact — configs/mister_de10nano_defconfig:580 is precisely `# BR2_PACKAGE_RTL88X2BU is not set`, with the preceding comment block (lines ~572-579) explaining the WPA3/SAE status_code=1 hardware-verified failure and the switch to CONFIG_RTW88_8822BU=m. board/mister/de10nano/linux.config:481 confirmed `CONFIG_RTW88_8822BU=m` exactly as cited. Edimax EW-7822ULC device ID (0x7392:0xb822) confirmed present in /mnt/source/linux/drivers/net/wireless/realtek/rtw88/rtw8822bu.c:18. Disposition, severity=feature-loss (mitigated by mainline coverage), and equivalence=superseded-better all confirmed correct.
